name: bullhorn-middle-office-api
description: OpenAPI 3.0 specification for Bullhorn Middle Office API

scripts.docs:redoc: redocly build-docs openapi.yaml -o ../build/redoc.html --title "Bullhorn Middle Office API" && cp ../build/redoc.html ../source/redoc.html && node inject-theme.js
scripts.docs:redoc:dev: redocly build-docs openapi.yaml -o ../source/redoc.html --title "Bullhorn Middle Office API" && node inject-theme.js
